text:
LONG NAME: VALID_DEATH_DT_SW 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
VALUES: 
Null = Default 
V = Valid death date 
COMMENT: 
The date of death of the beneficiary is contained in the BENE_DEATH_DT variable; many of these 
dates of death are not confirmed.
